forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain after 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 35. Southeast wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain. Cloudy, with a high near 46. South wind 5 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the city of Boston settles into the quiet hours of the night, the air carries a certain stillness, punctuated by a hint of moisture already gathering on the breeze. The temperature dips to a cool 35 degrees, urging those still awake to wrap themselves in layers. A gentle southeast wind whispers secrets of the impending morning, where a light drizzle may soon awaken the streets. With a chance of rain lingering like a distant memory, one can almost sense the clouds building a curtain around the city, hinting at a rather dreary Sunday ahead.

As dawn breaks, the clouds will deepen into a characteristic Boston gray, promising a more persistent rain that will accompany the day. With temperatures peaking around a numbing 46, the moisture in the air will hang heavily, interacting with the chill to create a palpable dampness. It seems fitting to don a waterproof jacket, sturdy footwear, and perhaps a woolen scarf to stave off the bite of the pervasive wind. While outdoor escapades may not beckon, the day presents an opportunity for subdued sophistication within the confines of cozy cafes or the singular charm of local bookstores. Engaging in a leisurely read with a warm beverage, or perhaps indulging in quiet conversations with friends, might be the best remedy to counteract the gloom. As raindrops trace patterns against window panes, embrace this quieter time as an invitation to slow down amidst the hustle, finding solace in life’s simpler pleasures.
